Games

Provably-fair instant games. Pick one and play.

Mines

Flip tiles for gems, dodge the bombs.

→

Crash

Cash out before the rocket explodes.

→

Tower

Climb floor by floor without stepping on a mine.

→

Ladder

Climb the rungs, multiplier grows each step.

→

Dice

Roll under or over your target.

→

Plinko

Drop the ball, ride the multipliers.

→

Roulette

European single-zero wheel.

→

Double

Coinflip — win ~2×, then ride it.

→

Daily Wheel

Spin once a day for free cash.

→

VIP Club

Wager to climb tiers and unlock perks.
